description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image. Define variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS. Add a before_script that updates apt, installs wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, downloads and extracts the Android SDK, updates SDK components (android-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK}, platform-tools, build-tools-${ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS}, extra-android-m2repository, extra-google-google_play_services, extra-google-m2repository), sets ANDROID_HOME and updates PATH, and makes gradlew executable. Define stages build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug and stores app/build/outputs/ as artifacts. In the test stage add a unitTests job that runs ./gradlew test, and a functionalTests job that downloads android-wait-for-emulator script, makes it executable, installs sys-img-x86-google_apis-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK}, creates an AVD named test, starts the emulator in headless mode, waits for it, sends keyevent 82, and runs ./gradlew cAT, publishing app/build/reports/androidTests/ as artifacts.
